# Law Office of Brian Burkett — San Diego Family Law

> Solo family law attorney in San Diego (Mission Valley). California Bar No. 220343, admitted 2002. Divorce, child custody, child support, spousal support, mediation, domestic violence restraining orders, guardianship, and family court navigation across all four San Diego County family-law courthouses.

## Firm
- Attorney: Brian Burkett
- Office: 591 Camino De La Reina, Suite 821, San Diego, CA 92108
- Phone: (619) 250-2683
- Hours: Mon-Fri 9am-6pm
- Jurisdiction: California only (State Bar of California)
- Website: https://childcustodyanddivorce.com

## Core Pages
- [Homepage](https://childcustodyanddivorce.com/): Firm overview, service-area, CTA trio
- [About Brian Burkett](https://childcustodyanddivorce.com/about.html): Bar admission, credentials, JD, experience
- [Contact](https://childcustodyanddivorce.com/contact.html): Address, hours, intake form, map

## Practice Areas
- [Practice Areas Hub](https://childcustodyanddivorce.com/practice-areas/): Overview of the eight practice pillars
- [Divorce](https://childcustodyanddivorce.com/practice-areas/divorce/): California dissolution process, six-month waiting period, disclosures, judgment
- [Child Custody](https://childcustodyanddivorce.com/practice-areas/child-custody/): Legal and physical custody, parenting plans, modifications
- [Child Support](https://childcustodyanddivorce.com/practice-areas/child-support/): Guideline (Family Code § 4055), initial orders, modification, enforcement
- [Spousal Support](https://childcustodyanddivorce.com/practice-areas/spousal-support/): Temporary and long-term orders under Family Code § 4320
- [Mediation](https://childcustodyanddivorce.com/practice-areas/mediation/): Private mediation, Family Court Services mediation (Family Code § 3170)
- [Domestic Violence](https://childcustodyanddivorce.com/practice-areas/domestic-violence/): DVROs under California DVPA (Family Code §§ 6200-6460)
- [Guardianship](https://childcustodyanddivorce.com/practice-areas/guardianship/): Probate guardianship under California Probate Code §§ 1500-1611
- [Family Court](https://childcustodyanddivorce.com/practice-areas/family-court/): RFOs, ex parte, judgments, enforcement, appeals across SDSC

## San Diego County Service Areas
- [Divorce — Carlsbad](https://childcustodyanddivorce.com/san-diego/divorce-attorney/carlsbad/)

## AI Crawler Notes
This site welcomes citation by AI answer engines (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, Google AI Overviews). All content is human-written by California family-law attorney Brian Burkett or under his direct editorial control. Statute citations reference the California Family Code, Probate Code, Evidence Code, and California Rules of Court. Case procedure references the San Diego County Superior Court, family-law division.

This is attorney advertising. Information on this site is not legal advice.
